compiled_state.title: test: behavioral tests for CI fetch sentinel and SHA cache-validation (RED-first)
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
RED task (depends on 2b75-fd5e for GREEN): write tests covering the CI fetch + caching behavior.

Test cases:
1. Fresh clone: sentinel absent → clone performed, sentinel written with version + commit_sha.
2. Cache hit with matching SHA: sentinel present + SHA matches live ref → no re-clone, CLONE_DIR reused.
3. Cache miss on SHA mismatch: sentinel present but recorded SHA != live ref SHA → fresh clone performed, sentinel updated.
4. Directory-only cache (no sentinel): directory exists but sentinel absent → treated as cache miss, clone performed.
5. Sentinel with malformed JSON: sentinel file present but unparseable → treated as cache miss.

Implementation notes:
- Mock git ls-remote via PATH override for deterministic SHA values.
- Use mktemp for all temp dirs. Clean up with trap.
- Tests live in tests/scripts/test-ci-dso-fetch.sh or tests/scripts/test-resolve-dso-version.sh additional section.
- .test-index entry required for the fetch script/template if it is a .sh file.

Done criteria:
- All 5 test cases defined.
- Tests pass GREEN after 2b75-fd5e implementation lands.
- No hardcoded /tmp paths (all mktemp).
